ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT MODERN LIFE INC.'s Motion To Stay Proceedings Pending Investigation By Defendant Modern Life Inc.'S Special Litigation Committee:

Defendant Modern Life Inc. d/b/a Modern Healthcare, Inc.'s motion to stay proceedings pending investigation by special litigation committee is granted. The action is stayed until February 21, 2021, or such earlier date as the special litigation committee may complete its investigation. (see word minute for details.)

Off Calendar Sep-10-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MARK PUNZALAN, Esq. of Chan Punzalan LLP (Tel: 650-362-4150) for Plaintiffs Benjamin McCann and Erik Buchanan;
Atty. REBECCA LYNN STUART, Esq. of Wilson Sonsini Goodrich & Rosati (Tel: 650-493-9300) for Defendant Alyson Friedensohn.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFFS BENJAMIN MCCANN AND ERIK BUCHANAN'S MOTION TO RECONSIDER ORDER DENYING PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO DISCOVERY PURSUANT TO CCP SEC. 1008.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Plaintiffs' counsel does not stipulate to the judge pro tem deciding the present motion. The Court indicates it will proceed with today's hearing on a non-stipulation basis and seek clarification afterwards from the Law & Motion Judge as to whether or not the parties' prior stipulation for the original motion to compel heard on August 3rd, 2020 carries over to the present motion.

Matter discussed.

The matter is provisionally continued to September 22, 2020 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. In the interim, the judge pro tem will either issue an order deciding the present motion if appropriate or prepare a report and recommendation for the September 22, 2020 hearing if appropriate.

Judge Pro Tem: Noah Lebowitz; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
